title: double free error when running MonetDBe Example
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c FLOAT, d DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT a, b, IFNULL(c, 0.0) AS c_value FROM test_table WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table(x INT PRIMARY KEY, y INT, FOREIGN KEY (y) REFERENCES test_table(a));
key_bug_features: double free detected during monetdbe_close function execution
